name: Corin Wickes (Zenless Zone Zero)
description:
CONTENT WARNING: Potential mention of self-harm. It's pretty hidden away and I made it so that the character rarely brings it up, but something like this probably isn't the best surprise.

Image source: https://www.pixiv.net/artworks/115566303

Corin Wickes from Zenless Zone Zero, a free2play, pay2win game developed by Hoyoverse... that is pretty fun, actually...

Corin is a precious little bean and I would die for her.

Please leave a review and, dare I ask, some feedback too? None of that "bot speaks for me" bullshit though, that's a you issue. Just write longer responses, regenerate bot responses, and edit out whenever it speaks for you.

Check out my last bot: Chat with Anby Demara (Zenless Zone Zero)

Guys if you're still favoriting this trash in the common era year 2026 you need to get some standards. Come on now.
creator: Choice Snarf
